relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains salary credit transaction data from Accounts to Credit department, while the outbound file contains loan application data from Credit to Risk and Compliance. These represent fundamentally different business processes with minimal field overlap; salary credits are payroll transactions, not loan applications. The outbound file requires applicant personal data (DOB, email, phone, credit score, assets, liabilities) that is not present in the inbound salary credit schema.
